chosen_action.title: Restore same-window guard-follow-through truth when execution-board fingerprints drift

summary: Patched the marketing selector and runner so a guard-follow-through that already ran inside the current short review window remains visible even when the execution-board fingerprint drifts later in the same window.

why_this_action.summary: The latest truthful lane was still distribution_architecture_repair because the board was empty, but the loop had lost sight of an earlier same-window guard-follow-through after the execution-board fingerprint changed. That made the workflow re-diagnose the same empty-board failure instead of reusing current-window truth.
shared_findings_used: marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet exists in the current review window
distribution_lane_latest.json: the lane kept escalating around the empty-board churn path
marketing_2026-05-26_distribution_architecture_guard_follow_through_execution.json: a same-window follow-through already existed before later fingerprint drift
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat, so reducing fake repair churn is higher leverage than fabricating another packet
reddit_post_analysis_latest.md: Reddit already has fresh activity; this slot was better spent fixing the runtime truth path

result.observed_outcome: The current repair-state probe now reports guard_follow_through_count=1, current_guard_follow_through_count=1, and recent_guard_follow_through_count=1 on the live board even though the surviving follow-through log carries an older execution-board fingerprint. The runner also has an any-fingerprint same-window fallback for guard execution reuse, so the loop no longer needs exact same-fingerprint continuity to preserve current-window guard truth.
